title: Claw Networking
subtitle: Read OpenClaw instances from the registry and keep gateway connectivity visible in one place.
description: This registry-backed view surfaces the OpenClaw runtimes already registered inside Claw Studio so you can verify networking posture, gateway exposure, and routing readiness before agents go online.
loadFailedDescription: We could not read the OpenClaw registry snapshot right now.
emptyTitle: No OpenClaw instances are registered yet
emptyDescription: Install or register an OpenClaw runtime first. Once it is in the registry, this page will show its gateway endpoint, WebSocket entry, storage namespace, and route readiness.
noDescription: This OpenClaw runtime is already present in the registry and ready for connectivity review.
